uplink.description: fPort 1, format v01: warm indoor climate (~22.4 C, 55 %rH, 1013 hPa), CO2-e present, battery 2.95 V, txpower 0
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds frame; expected derived by running the upstream TTN decoder (vendor/n-fuse/ste.js, the source of truth) and mapping bme680.temperature->air.temperature (round 2), bme680.humidity->air.relativeHumidity, bme680.pressure->air.pressure, bme680.co2(CO2-e)->air.co2, info.battery(V)->battery; bme680.voc/iaq/iaq_accuracy.str + info.version/txpower -> camelCase extras. CO2-e value reflects upstream's exact bit-packing (kept verbatim).

uplink.description: fPort 1, format v01: cool frame (~-9.9 C, 72 %rH, 980 hPa), high IAQ accuracy, CO2-e + bVOC-e present, battery 2.40 V, txpower 1
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds frame; expected derived from the upstream TTN decoder (source of truth). voc rounded to 4 decimals; iaq_accuracy index 3 -> 'high'. Negative temperature exercises the (count/511*125-40) path.
Expected derived from the upstream TTN decoder: decodeUplink asserts fPort == 1.

uplink.description: format-version guard: odd bytes[0] is rejected (upstream precedence quirk bytes[0] & 0xc0 != 0x40)
uplink._note: Expected derived from the upstream TTN decoder: the version guard evaluates as (bytes[0] & 1) due to JS operator precedence, ported verbatim. bytes[0]=65 is odd -> rejected.
